import React ,{useState} from 'react' import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { ToastContainer} from "react-toastify"; function Signup() { const [signupInfo , setSignupInfo] = useState({ name : "", email : "", password : "" }) const handleChange=(e) => { const {name , value} = e.target; console.log(name,value); const copySignupInfo = {...signupInfo}; copySignupInfo[name] = value; setSignupInfo(copySignupInfo); } const handleSignup = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); console.log(signupInfo); } console.log("signupInfo -> ", signupInfo) return (
